name: Physical Skill Sewing Evidence - Example Pack
description: Fictional Hybrid Mode example showing how OKPF can package physical-process evidence without defining robotics control semantics or guaranteeing transfer.

license.details: Fictional example content for OKPF documentation and testing.

usage_policy.notes: Illustrative only. Not machine-control guidance, not an executable policy, not safety certification, and not evidence of transfer to another system.

expert_notes.rationale: Demonstrates responsible Envelope/Hybrid packaging for physical skill evidence using fictional sewing-machine data.
limitations: All data is fabricated for format demonstration.
No real machine, operator, robot, or policy was used.
Does not define executable robot control.

known_limits: Not validated on different material classes
known_non_claims: Does not define executable robot control
